name: Barbeque Pork
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Pork Butt or Shoulder Roast (lean and boneless)
1 large bottle Kraft Honey BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onions in half lengthwise, then slice into 1/4-inch slices. Halve the slices and separate them into rings.
2. Trim all possible fat from the roast and sprinkle with garlic salt and seasoned pepper.
3. Place half the onions in the crockpot, put in the roast, and top with the rest of the onions.
4. Pour 1 cup of soda over everything.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 10 to 12 hours, or overnight until the pork can be easily shredded with two forks.
6. Remove the pork from the pot and shred it in a bowl, removing all possible fat.
7. Remove the onions with a slotted spoon and add them to the bowl.
8. Discard any remaining juice in the pot.
9. Return the onions and pork to the pot, then add BBQ sauce to everything and mix well.
10. Continue cooking on LOW for 5 to 6 hours, adding more BBQ sauce as needed.
11. Serve as sandwiches in buns. Leftovers may be cooled, made into sandwiches, wrapped in heavy plastic wrap, and frozen individually for later use. They keep well and can be unwrapped, rewrapped in paper towels, and heated in a microwave at 50% power for a few minutes.
